notes: reflectance/photoresistor-style analog line-and-edge sensor — a cheaper, simpler alternative or complement to a ToF module: a single analog voltage, not an I2C reading. `value` here represents that voltage as a 0 (dark/no reflection) to 100 (bright/reflecting) reading, not a physical distance.
description: A simple line/edge sensor: reads reflected light off the floor as a single analog voltage. Cheaper and simpler than a ToF module, and a common alternative for line-following or a second, independent way to sense the table edge.
